event: history of tricuspid atresia post-lateral tunnel Fontan
initial oxygen saturation 40% on room air
oxygen saturation improved to 86% with HFNC
slowly titrated down on supplemental oxygen
chest tube water seal on day 11
repeat blood count showed decreased hemoglobin
nasal cannula oxygen weaned to 1 liter
oxygen saturation returned to baseline at rest
lost to cardiology follow-up for 14 years
